title: Burning of the Red Lotus Temple
writer: Xiang Kairan, Shichuan Zhang, Zhengqiu Zheng
actors: Xiaoqiu Zheng, Peizhen Xia, Lihen Gao
plot: This movie was adapted from a newspaper serial (Strange Tales of the Adventurer in the Wild Country) and released in 18 feature-length parts over a period of 3 years (1928-31). In its entirety it would be 27 hours long.
